testcase.name: test_admin_pin_set_requires_admin
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_verify_audit.py:54: in cashier_token assert res.status_code == 200, f"Cashier login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Cashier login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

error.message: failed on setup with "AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get'"
